title: androsace carnea f. laggeri
intro: Androsace carnea f. laggeri, also known as rock jasmine or Alpine rose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family. Native to the mountainous regions of Europe, this perennial plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory infections, offering benefits like reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and boosted immune system. Androsace carnea f. laggeri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and homeopathic remedies.
